routes.flag_when: Sink-wide translation or missing screen/field tests

routes.review_stance: Observation-only unless producer handoff is proven
routes.flag_when: Flat message-log dictionary catchalls or bypassed producer helpers
Broad popup fallback without overload/route tests
English SVO shape survives or color/placeholders are lost

routes.review_stance: Tested route-owned translator; no broad Does() patch
routes.flag_when: Direct broad mutation or verb token leakage
Procedural text hidden as asset leaves or renderer-only labels translated broadly
Probe evidence is treated as ownership or visible text is mutated at the renderer
